# Recap

Create a tiny out-of-context recap of the current situation and recent changes. Use when the user says /vs-recap, recap, catch me up, where are we, out of context, I have no context, or explain what is going on.

## Installation

Part of the `vs` plugin — see the repo README for Claude Code and Codex install instructions. Every skill is self-contained, so you can also copy this directory straight into your agent's skills folder.

## Structure

```
recap/
  SKILL.md              # Skill definition
```
